display.purpose: Hero title (h1) and the closing chapter headline only.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, stat labels, table headers — always uppercase, tracked.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition timing for color/background/border state changes (0.15s-0.25s).

components.name: Nav Link (active)
components.description: Desktop header nav link in its active/current-page state.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: block; padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #8a9baa; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ddeef2; background: #162030; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #2dd4bf; background: rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.08); } .ds-nav-link-active:hover { color: #5eead4; background: rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.12); }

components.name: Stat
components.description: Big-number stat block used in the hero and summary sections.
components.html: 8.4 GWCapacidad ERNC instalada42% del sistema eléctrico
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: clamp(2.125rem, 1.825rem + 1.5vw, 3.125rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; color: #ddeef2; } .ds-stat-accent .ds-stat-value { color: #2dd4bf; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.72rem + 0.16vw, 0.875rem); color: #8a9baa; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .ds-stat-sub { font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.72rem + 0.16vw, 0.875rem); color: #8a9baa; }

components.name: Card (default / winner)
components.description: Comparison card used in the region-compare tool, with a highlighted 'winner' state.
components.css: .ds-card { display: grid; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #1e2833; border-radius: 6px; background: #111822; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #1a5a52; } .ds-card-winner { border-color: #1a5a52; background: color-mix(in srgb, #111822 92%, #2dd4bf 8%); } .ds-card-title { font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1.05rem + 0.38vw, 1.375rem); color: #ddeef2; }

components.name: Callout / Insight Block
components.description: Left-accented panel for a sourced editorial insight or aside — the system's one deliberate exception to the no-side-stripe rule.
components.html:
Dato clave+18% interanual

Crecimiento de capacidad ERNC respecto al año anterior.
components.css: .ds-callout { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem; border-left: 2px solid #2dd4bf; background: color-mix(in srgb, #111822 84%, #0b0f14); } .ds-callout-title { font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.72rem + 0.16vw, 0.875rem); color: #8a9baa; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .ds-callout-value { font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1.05rem + 0.38vw, 1.375rem); color: #ddeef2; } .ds-callout-context { color: #8a9baa; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Select Field
components.description: Region/technology dropdown used in the compare tool.
components.css: .ds-select { width: 100%; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 2.5rem 0.75rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid #1e2833; border-radius: 4px; background-color: #0b0f14; color: #ddeef2; appearance: none; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-select:hover { border-color: #1a5a52; } .ds-select:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2dd4bf; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tabs (underline)
components.description: Underline-style tab used for chart view switching.
components.css: .ds-tablist { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: fit-content; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2833; } .ds-tab { min-height: 2rem; padding: 0.45rem 1rem 0.55rem; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #8a9baa; font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.72rem + 0.16vw, 0.875rem); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #ddeef2; } .ds-tab-active { color: #ddeef2; box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 #2dd4bf; }

narrative.overview: Proyecto Matriz reads like a newsroom data analyst's terminal at night: a dark canvas, a faint instrument-grid glowing behind the hero, and one signal color that marks what matters. Nothing here is decorative for its own sake — every visual choice exists to make sourced, verifiable numbers easier to trust and easier to scan. The system rejects marketing-site polish: no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric SaaS templates, no cheerful illustration. Warmth and optimism about the transition come from the numbers themselves and the narrative arc of the chapters, not from decorative flourish.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black base with a cool blue-green undertone, never a warm neutral
A single signal color (teal) used generously across active states, links, and key figures, but never applied to bulk surface
Flat by doctrine: depth comes from tonal layering and hairline borders, never shadows
Chapter-numbered storytelling (01–04) because the homepage genuinely is a sequence of findings, not decorative scaffolding
Fluid type scale (clamp()-based steps) so hierarchy holds from phone to desktop without breakpoint-specific overrides

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only saturated color in the system. It marks emphasis and interactivity; it never fills a surface. A second semantic meaning is expressed via color-mix() tints of teal, not a new hue.

rules.name: The Cool-Black Rule
rules.body: The base is a blue-green-tinted near-black (#0b0f14), never a true black and never warm. Every neutral in the ramp keeps that same cool undertone.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: No serif, no display webfont, no second sans is ever introduced. Hierarchy is built entirely from weight, size, and letter-spacing within the system-sans stack.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never lift. A card, callout, or panel signals 'layer above' purely by moving one step up the tonal ramp plus a 1px border — never a shadow, however subtle.

dos: Do keep the base cool and near-black (#0b0f14) — never substitute a warm or true-black neutral.
Do use Signal Teal generously across interactive and emphasis states (active nav, hovers, multiple stats in one view).
Do route every non-directional chart series through the Signal Teal aliases --chart-ernc and --chart-net-billing.
Do build depth with tonal layering (Base → Surface → Subtle) and hairline borders only.
Do cap body copy at the existing --measure (62ch) for readability.
Do use numbered chapter markers (01, 02, 03…) only where the content is a genuine sequence of findings, as on the homepage.
donts: Don't introduce a warm neutral, cream, or sand background anywhere in the system.
Don't add box-shadow-based elevation to cards, panels, or modals.
Don't add a second saturated color.
Don't use border-left accent stripes as generic card/list decoration — reserved for the Callout component only.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism-as-decoration, or hero-metric SaaS templates.
